comments.body:
<!-- test-coverage-review -->

## ✅ Test Coverage Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-23 05:10:41 PT

All source code changes have corresponding test coverage.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Source Files Reviewed

#### PR Title & Body Updates
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/ci_update_pr_body.py` - Modified (✅ tested)
  - New function: `_parse_title_and_summary()` - parses Claude output into title and summary (2 dedicated unit tests)
  - Updated: `UpdateSuccess` dataclass with new `title` field (5 integration tests verify field)
  - Updated: `_update_pr_body_impl()` - now calls `github.update_pr_title_and_body()` with title parameter (5 tests verify both title and body update)
  - Updated: CLI command output includes `title` in JSON response (4 tests verify JSON structure and type)

### Test Coverage Summary
- ✅ 2 new unit tests for `_parse_title_and_summary()` with edge cases (multiline and single-line)
- ✅ 5 existing tests updated to verify title field in `UpdateSuccess`
- ✅ 3 existing tests enhanced to verify both `updated_pr_titles` and `updated_pr_bodies` are called
- ✅ 4 existing tests verify JSON output includes `title` field with correct type

### Patterns Checked
✅ New helper function - Full unit test coverage with multiline and single-line edge cases
✅ Dataclass field addition - Covered by integration tests that verify field is populated
✅ Gateway method change - Tests verify both title and body are passed to `update_pr_title_and_body()`
✅ JSON output changes - Tests verify new `title` field is present and correctly typed

### Violations Summary
None found.

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-23 05:10:41 PT**: Modified ci_update_pr_body.py - added PR title generation feature with comprehensive test coverage (2 new unit tests, 5+ integration tests updated)
- **2026-02-23 04:56:40 PT**: PR reviewed - all source changes have test coverage (new admin claude-ci command, gateway methods, TUI commands)

</details>

<!-- tripwires-review -->

## ✅ Tripwires Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-23 05:10:36 PT

Found 0 violations. All code changes comply with erk coding standards.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Tripwires Triggered
- **adding a new field to dataclass** → Verified frozen dataclass pattern compliance
- **updating gateway method calls** → Verified proper gateway usage
- **modifying test assertions** → Verified comprehensive test coverage

### Tier 1 Pattern Matches
✅ `@dataclass\(frozen=True\)` - Found and correctly used in UpdateSuccess
✅ `subprocess\.run\(|run_subprocess_with_context\(` - None found (good)
✅ `Path\.home\(\)` - None found (good)

### Tier 2 Semantic Matches
✅ **Adding field to dataclass** - UpdateSuccess.title field added correctly with frozen=True
✅ **Gateway method calls** - Properly uses github.update_pr_title_and_body() instead of update_pr_body()
✅ **Test coverage** - All tests updated to verify title field and new behavior
✅ **Type imports** - BodyText imported from correct location (erk_shared.gateway.github.types)
✅ **LBYL pattern** - _parse_title_and_summary uses proper length check before indexing

### Violations Summary
**No violations found.**

### Files Reviewed
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/ci_update_pr_body.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_ci_update_pr_body.py`: 0 violations

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-23 05:10:36 PT**: No violations detected. Clean implementation of PR title generation feature.
- **2026-02-23 04:58:52 PT**: All tripwires clean. 5-place gateway implementation verified complete with integration tests.

</details>
